Process

3 Steps to Compete

01
Create Your WeTrade Account
Register in under 2 minutes. Open to all experience levels across 180+ countries.
02
Trade the Live Markets
Access forex, indices, commodities and crypto via MT4, MT5, or WeTrade's web terminal. Ranked on return % — fair for all account sizes.
03
Win & Collect Your Prize
Results tracked live on our public leaderboard. Verified winners receive full prize payments within 7 business days of competition close.

Why WeTrade

Built on Trust. Since 2015.

In Trust We Trade

Globally Regulated & Audited
Licensed and regulated since 2015. All competition results are independently verified and displayed live on our transparent public leaderboard.
Ultra-Low Spreads
Institutional-grade execution with no requotes and no slippage during high-impact news — the same edge used by professional trading desks.
Fair % Return Ranking
We rank by return percentage, not absolute profit. A $500 account can outrank a $50,000 account. Pure skill — zero capital advantage.
MT4, MT5 & Web Terminal
Trade from desktop or mobile using MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, or WeTrade's browser-based terminal with advanced charting tools.
WeTrade Rewards Points
Earn Reward Points on every lot traded. Redeem them in our exclusive Rewards Mall — gadgets, luxury goods and more, delivered worldwide.
WeTrade Social Copy Trading
Follow and auto-copy top competition performers in real time through WeTrade Social — the industry's pioneering copy trading platform.
